title: Savant
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the rank in the priest caste|the [[Initiate (Shaper)|rank]] in the [[shaper caste]]}}
'''Savant''' was the lowest rank in the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[priest caste]]. Savants would be promoted to [[Seer (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|seer]] after receiving an accurate vision from the [[Yun'o|gods]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2002-02-XX -->''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]''
